rules.title: Server Rules
rules.description: Please read and follow all rules. Violations may result in warnings, mutes, kicks, or bans.
rules.footer: Last updated by staff • Violations can be reported to moderators

rules.title: Be Respectful
rules.description: Treat all members with respect. Harassment, hate speech, slurs, and targeted abuse are strictly prohibited.

rules.title: No Discrimination
rules.description: Racism, homophobia, and transphobia will not be tolerated and may result in an immediate ban.

rules.title: No NSFW or Illegal Content
rules.description: Do not post NSFW, NSFL, explicit, or illegal content anywhere in the server.

rules.title: No Spam or Self-Promotion
rules.description: Do not spam messages, reactions, images, or mentions. Unsolicited ads and server invites are not allowed.

rules.title: No Doxxing or Privacy Violations
rules.description: Do not share personal information of others without their explicit consent.

rules.title: Creative Submissions
rules.description: Share creative work in #projects and #projects-discussion. AI-generated content is banned from #projects and #artwork.

rules.title: No Raiding or Inter-Server Drama
rules.description: Do not raid or discuss raiding other servers.

rules.title: No Alternate Accounts
rules.description: Do not circumvent rules or bans using alt accounts.

rules.title: Use AI Responsibly
rules.description: Use AI ethically. Do not generate inappropriate or misleading content.

rules.title: Follow Discord ToS
rules.description: Comply with Discord's Terms of Service and Community Guidelines at all times.

rules.title: Listen to Staff
rules.description: Follow moderator and admin directions. Arguing with staff in public is not allowed.

rules.title: No Rage Baiting
rules.description: Grievous rage baiting is a bannable offense.

rules.title: Keep It Appropriate
rules.description: Avoid being excessively annoying or sexual in chat, especially if you are a minor.

rules.title: Display Names
rules.description: No invisible, blank, or extremely distracting display name characters.

rules.title: Stop Leaving and Rejoining
rules.description: Repeatedly leaving and rejoining is disruptive. Members observed doing this will be banned.
